home.sub: A production ministry serving, training, and resourcing the churches of Croatia and the surrounding region — freely, so no congregation is ever priced out of excellence.
home.who_lede: We exist for the unseen crew — first in, last out. Production is the door we walk through, but the person has always been the point.
home.value1_text: Gear and skill matter, but souls matter more. We minister to technical artists, not just their mixes.
home.value2_text: Faders and fixtures open the room where discipleship happens. Craft is our way in, never the end.
home.value3_text: When teams are served and trained, something grows that outlasts any event: people who belong.
home.cta_lede: Thauma is support-raised so churches never have to pay for help. Your partnership is what makes that possible.

about.title: About
about.dict_def1: wonder; a marvel; the thing that makes people stop.
about.dict_def2: the word the Gospels reach for when crowds marveled at what Jesus did.
about.dict_def3: what a production team builds in the dark, before the room ever fills.
about.body1: Thauma is a production ministry for the Protestant churches of Croatia and the broader Balkans. The need is simple to state: churches need help with production — audio, video, lighting, streaming, and the people who run them — and no organization exists to meet that need on the ground in this region.
about.body2: These churches are small, scattered, and volunteer-run. Aging equipment with no one trained to use it. Volunteers operating complex systems with no one to learn from. No training pipeline, no peer network, no budget for the consultants that serve Western churches. The need is real — and the people carrying it, the ones who arrive first and leave last, need what every isolated servant needs: skill, support, and the company of others who do what they do.
about.body3: We go as learners and participants of the cultures where we serve. We are not there to recreate churches in the image of any outside model — we come alongside what the local church has already established, meeting needs as those churches define them. That is why language and cultural learning come first, dominate the early years, and never fully end.
about.status_note: Thauma is a Missouri nonprofit in formation, serving the whole Protestant church across denominations.

mission.title: Mission
mission.lede: These are not stages to complete but ongoing expressions of the same calling — each grows out of the last, and in time all three run together.
mission.work1_text: Embedding with local churches for extended periods — serving alongside their volunteers in real services, fixing what is broken, improving what is struggling, and demonstrating care through competent work. This is the front door of the ministry.
mission.work2_text: Practical, in-language training for volunteers and teams: from signal flow and mixing fundamentals to troubleshooting and stewardship of limited equipment. Helping churches make wise, affordable decisions and connecting them to knowledge they lack access to.
mission.work3_text: Regional gatherings that bring production people together across congregations and denominations — and investing in faithful local people as leaders who can train others. This is the fruit and the long game.
mission.horizon_text: The horizon is honest: meaningful fruit is expected on a five-to-ten-year timeline, not a two-year one. Serving grows out of the language-and-culture foundation; training grows out of serving; community and leaders grow out of both. We commit to the whole arc and refuse to rush it — the slow foundation is what makes the later fruit possible.
mission.success_text: Success looks like a community of church production people — techs, worship leaders, pastors — existing where it did not before, meeting and helping one another without us driving every connection.

items.title: The person is the point
items.text: Care for the individual is the heart underneath everything. It is the engine of the organization and governs how every interaction is conducted.

items.title: Production is the door
items.text: The technical need is real and legitimate — not a pretense for relationship but a genuine service the church requires. We support churches in their needs as they have them.

items.title: Community is the fruit
items.text: The measure of success is a community of church production people — pastors, worship leaders, and techs together — existing where it did not before.

items.title: Multiplication
items.text: The aim is people who serve people who serve people. Everyone invested in is a potential source, not an endpoint — and we succeed precisely as our own center becomes less necessary.

items.title: For the whole church
items.text: No corner of the Protestant church owns this work. Independence and evenhandedness across denominations are identity, not preference.

items.title: Assimilation, not influence
items.text: We go as students and participants of the cultures where we serve — never as reformers of them. Language and culture come first, and the posture never ends.

items.title: God does the work
items.text: We open doors and serve faithfully; the fruit is God's. Without this conviction, none of the rest matters.

resources.title: Resources
resources.empty_text: As we serve churches on the ground, the guides, translations, and tools we build will live here — in Croatian and English, free to every church. If there's something your team needs now, reach out and ask.

give.title: Give
give.lede: Thauma is donor-funded in the missionary-support tradition. We do not charge the churches we serve — your partnership is what makes every hour of serving, training, and resourcing free.
give.monthly_text: Committed monthly support is the backbone of this ministry — it funds the language years, the serving, and the long horizon.
give.project_text: One-time gifts toward equipment, travel, and gathering costs as specific needs arise.
give.legal_note: Thauma is a Missouri nonprofit in formation. Until federal tax-exempt status is granted, gifts are not yet tax-deductible — we will say so plainly here the moment that changes.
give.form_placeholder: Our secure giving form will live here.

contact.title: Contact
contact.lede: A church that needs help, a question about the mission, a desire to partner — every message lands with a real person.
contact.form_success: Thank you — we'll get back to you soon.

events.title: Events
events.empty_text: Regional gatherings are part of the long-term vision — production people from many congregations, together. When the first one is planned, registration will open here.

staff.title: Staff
staff.login_note: This area is for the Thauma network. Sign in to continue.

footer.legal: © 2026 Thauma · A Missouri nonprofit in formation
footer.tagline: All of it for all of Him.

coming.text: Thauma — a production ministry for the churches of Croatia and the surrounding region — is in development. The lights come up soon.
